features.matchText: For the year ended June 30, 2025, the School elected to match participant contributions at a rate of 100% of deferrals, up to 5% of participants’ eligible compensation.
features.eligibilityText: In order to be eligible for this matching contribution, participants must be non-highly compensated employees, have completed one full year of initial eligibility service, attained age 21, be credited with at least 1,000 hours of service in the plan year, faculty must be employed on the last day …
